OutputStreamWriter.java

00027 permission to link this library with independent modules to produce an
00028 executable, regardless of the license terms of these independent
00029 modules, and to copy and distribute the resulting executable under
00030 terms of your choice, provided that you also meet, for each linked
00031 independent module, the terms and conditions of the license of that
00032 module.  An independent module is a module which is not derived from
00033 or based on this library.  If you modify this library, you may extend
00034 this exception to your version of the library, but you are not
00035 obligated to do so.  If you do not wish to do so, delete this
00036 exception statement from your version. */
00037 
00038 package java.io;
00039 
00063 public class OutputStreamWriter extends Writer
00064 {
00068     private OutputStream out;
00069 
00083     public OutputStreamWriter(OutputStream out, String encoding)
00084         throws UnsupportedEncodingException
00085     {
00086         if (!encoding.equals("ISO8859_1")
00087             && !encoding.equals("US_ASCII")
00088             && !encoding.equals("UTF-8"))
00089         {
00090             throw new UnsupportedEncodingException();
00091         }
00092 
00093         this.out = out;
00094     }
00095 
00102     public OutputStreamWriter(OutputStream out)
00103     {
00104         this.out = out;
00105     }
00106 
00114     public void write(int ch) throws IOException
00115     {
00116         write(new char[] { (char) ch }, 0, 1);
00117     }
00118 
00130     public void write(char[] buf, int offset, int count) throws IOException
00131     {
00132         if (buf == null)
00133             throw new IOException();
00134 
00135         byte[] b = new byte[count];
00136 
00137         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++)
00138             b[i] = (byte) ((buf[offset + i] <= 0xFF) ? buf[offset + i] : '?');
00139 
00140         out.write(b);
00141     }
00142 
00155     public void write(String str, int offset, int count) throws IOException
00156     {
00157         if (str == null)
00158            throw new IOException();
00159 
00160         write(str.toCharArray(), offset, count);
00161     }
00162 
00168     public void flush() throws IOException
00169     {
00170         if (out != null)
00171         {
00172             out.flush();
00173         }
00174     }
00175 
00182     public void close() throws IOException
00183     {
00184         synchronized (lock)
00185         {
00186             if (out == null)
00187                 return;
00188 
00189             flush();
00190             out.close();
00191             out = null;
00192         }
00193     }
00194 } // class OutputStreamWriter
00195
